mind.name: Mindfulness
mind.description: Train the mind through meditation. The foundation of the whole development.

sotapatti.name: Beginner Path
sotapatti.desc: For those beginning, or returning after a long absence. Five minutes morning, five minutes evening. Nothing else. The single task is to make the chain unbroken until missing a day feels strange.

sakadagami.name: Established Path
sakadagami.desc: For those with a daily practice already underway. Two sits of fifteen minutes each. You may add one supporting habit — one only — to accompany the sits without overwhelming them.

anagami.name: Dedicated Path
anagami.desc: For serious practitioners whose sitting is already part of the day. Two sits of thirty minutes each. Up to three supporting habits. The subtle defilements become the real work.
anagami.tagline: Dedicated • 30 + 30 minutes • up to 3 supporting habits

arahant.name: Veteran Path
arahant.desc: For long-term practitioners who already sit an hour morning and an hour evening. All supporting habits are available. The subtle defilements — conceit, restlessness, residual craving — become the real battleground at this practice intensity. This is the most demanding starting configuration. Note: this is a description of practice intensity, not an attainment claim — no setup choice in any tool can put you at any of the four noble persons. That work is yours and your teacher's.
arahant.tagline: Veteran practitioner • 60 + 60 minutes • all habits available

custom.name: Your Own Path
custom.desc: You set the duration for each sit with a slider. You pick any supporting habits you wish. For those who already know what they need.

body.name: Body & Health
body.description: Strengthen the vessel that carries you

foundation_movement.name: Daily Movement Foundation
foundation_movement.desc: Establish basic physical health. The minimum effective dose for someone starting from zero.

marathon.name: Marathon Training
marathon.desc: Build a runner's base. 16 weeks from zero to marathon-ready pacing.

weight_recomp.name: Body Recomposition
weight_recomp.desc: Sustainable fat loss + muscle gain. Built on the only two things that actually work: progressive resistance training + protein.

knowledge.name: Knowledge & Skills
knowledge.description: Master a craft, language, or domain through deep practice

language.name: Learn a Language
language.desc: Spaced repetition + comprehensible input. Built on what actually works (Krashen, Wozniak), not what feels productive.

instrument.name: Learn an Instrument
instrument.desc: Daily focused practice beats marathon weekend sessions. Ericsson's deliberate practice for music.

deep_reading.name: Become a Deep Reader
deep_reading.desc: Replace shallow scrolling with sustained engagement. For anyone whose attention has been fragmented by feeds.

bad_habit.name: Replace a Bad Habit
bad_habit.description: Rewire one specific pattern using cue-routine-reward replacement

phone_addiction.name: Reclaim Attention from the Phone
phone_addiction.desc: For chronic scrolling, dopamine hijack, and the loss of deep focus. Built on Wendy Wood's environment design research.

smallHabits.name: No phone first 60 min after waking

sugar.name: Break the Sugar Loop
sugar.desc: Sugar is one of the few substances that creates a real craving cycle. Replacing it requires both removing the cue and giving the reward another way.

drinking.name: Loosen Alcohol's Grip
drinking.desc: Whether you're going dry or just cutting back. The replacement is what makes it stick — your brain needs the same evening signal.

arts.name: Creative Practice
arts.description: Build a body of creative work through daily showing-up

writing.name: Write Daily
writing.desc: For anyone trying to finish a novel, build a writing habit, or simply think clearly on the page.

visual_art.name: Daily Visual Practice
visual_art.desc: For drawing, painting, or any visual craft. Quantity creates quality.
